title: crepis hyemalis
intro: Crepis hyemalis, also known as winter rosinroot, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It is used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating rheumatism, and promoting digestive health. Crepis hyemalis can be prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use, and is also used in some traditional herbal remedies.
